[1] "What will you do during Golden Week?"

KIHARA MOE I will just be relax at home

FUKAYA MINA I will do my part-time jobs. I want to earn a lot of money.

YAHAGI AYA I will go Nagano with my family.

TEZUKA ASUMI I’m going to visit my grandmother. Her birthday is coming soon, so I will celebrate it with her.
KOJIMA TAKUMI I’ll go to Thailand.
NEGISHI HANA I am going to work and save money
KONDO AN I will practice lacrosse very hard.
